response.justification: Over 15 years of professional fullstack experience with a strong direct match on the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes — and current hands-on work in AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at the staff level. TDD fluency, testing culture, and architectural breadth across high-throughput systems are all evident. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Python mention, and Kotlin is implied but not confirmed.
strengths: Deep, current fullstack experience with direct TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS stack alignment
Active AI agent and MCP framework development in present role — rare and directly relevant
Strong testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, community workshops, and personally authored test frameworks
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere in the resume — a primary framework requirement
Python absent from listed skills despite being required for multi-language proficiency
Kotlin not explicitly named; Java is present but secondary and unquantified in depth
